content: The intrinsic curiosity bonuses calculated by AI methods like ICM and RND map directly to the brain’s active memory encoding mechanism: just as curious RL agents prioritize exploring poorly predicted state transitions to improve long-term task performance, the human brain allocates stronger episodic memory encoding to information that violates prior expectations, which is itself a form of intrinsic curiosity-driven learning. This suggests that the core optimization objective of current curious RL agents is implicitly aligned with how the human brain evolved to manage memory for open-ended learning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
memory as active learning human brain mechanisms
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
